title: Oriate 12PCS Mini Dinosaurs Figurines Toys with Dinosaur Trainning Fence Play Toys Set for Kids 3-5 5-7, Capture n Escape Dino World Playset, Including 12 Jurassic Dinosaur Fences & 2 Blasters
features: Super Jurassic Dionsaur Arena Fighting Playset - Bring home this adventure of Jurassic dinosaur park with this arena fighting playset. Enjoy destruction, fight and blasting play! Set includes 2 big dino fighter and 12 mini dinosaur figures. The set is made from high-quality materials and is built to last through hours of playtime.

High quality materials - Our dinosaur toys are crafted from top-quality materials, ensuring that each figure is long-lasting. The attention to detail in each toy is evident, from the intricate scales and textures to the vivid colors that bring these ancient creatures to life. You can buy Oriate other series of dinosaur toys together for play, that would be more fun.

Fun and versatile set for your little ones - With these different dinosaur models and fences that can be interconnected in various ways, this set offers limitless possibilities for creative play. Kids can imagine and explore different dinosaur habitats, create epic battles, or even use these toys as part of a larger playset.

Promise to Do Our Best- Oriate care about our customers' satisfaction and take great pride in providing excellent products and service. That's why we've designed these toys to be both fun and educational, offering a unique opportunity for kids to learn about prehistoric times. Plus, our friendly and knowledgeable customer service team is always available to answer any questions or concerns you may have.

Great value and unbeatable entertainment - This dinosaur toy set is a great investment in your child's imagination and education. This set is packed with fun and entertainment value that's sure to keep kids engaged for hours on end. Whether playing alone or with friends, this dinosaur toy set is a must-have for any young dinosaur lover.

Please note: If you receive a dinosaur figure that cannot stand, soak the mini dinosaur toys in hot water at 100 centigrade for 5 minutes so that it can stand steadily. Due to the dinosaur toys are made of soft and resilient plastic, they may become unstable during transportation due to compression, but this is not a quality issue. Please understand.
description: Product Description We are always committed to making toys that help children grow up happily. Our dinosaur toy are carefully designed and made of the highest quality material Realistic Design Dinosaurs are mysterious and imaginative creatures that have disappeared from the earth for tens of thousands of years, but their images and stories have always captivated people's attention. In order to let children better understand dinosaurs, we designed this set of realistic dinosaur toys. Safe Toys are an integral part of children's growth. Our toy products are made of safe and harmless materials, safe and non-toxic, with no odor, and pay attention to the details and design of some toys, so as to provide our children with a safe, healthy, happy toy environment.
